choose_server.title: Choose SignalK Server
choose_server.description: A SignalK addon was detected on this system. Would you like to use it?

manual_url.title: SignalK Server URL
manual_url.description: Enter the base URL of your SignalK server.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Please approve the access request in the SignalK Admin UI at {base_url}. Go to Security → Access Requests and approve the Home Assistant request, then click Submit.

prefix.title: Entity Prefix
prefix.description: Choose a prefix for entity IDs (e.g., 'signalk' → sensor.signalk_speed_over_ground).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SignalK server. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please approve the access request in the SignalK Admin UI and try again.

abort.already_configured: This SignalK server is already configured.

init.title: SignalK Bridge Settings
init.description: Configure the integration behavior. The publish profile controls how frequently sensor states are updated in Home Assistant.

data.create_diagnostic_entities: Create diagnostic entities (connection status, server version)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SignalK server at the new URL.

put_value.name: Put Value
put_value.description: Send a PUT request to a SignalK path for vessel self.

path.name: SignalK Path
path.description: The SignalK path to write to.

post_delta.name: Post Delta
post_delta.description: Send a delta update for a SignalK path for vessel self.

set_domain_policy.name: Set Domain Policy
set_domain_policy.description: Update the publish policy for a SignalK domain.

deadband.name: Deadband
deadband.description: Absolute change threshold for numeric values.

enabled_by_default.name: Enabled By Default
enabled_by_default.description: Whether new entities in this domain start enabled.

reset_domain_policy.name: Reset Domain Policy
reset_domain_policy.description: Reset a domain's policy to profile defaults.

set_discovery_defaults.name: Set Discovery Defaults
set_discovery_defaults.description: Update global discovery and publish settings.

enable_new_sensors_by_default.name: Enable New Sensors
enable_new_sensors_by_default.description: Whether newly discovered sensors start enabled.

publish_profile.name: Publish Profile
publish_profile.description: The base publish profile (conservative, balanced, realtime).

rescan_paths.name: Rescan Paths
rescan_paths.description: Rescan all known paths from the in-memory value store.

reclassify_paths.name: Reclassify Paths
reclassify_paths.description: Re-run the classifier on all known paths.

enable_entities.name: Enable Entities
enable_entities.description: Enable one or more SignalK entities.

entity_ids.name: Entity IDs
entity_ids.description: Entity ID or list of entity IDs to enable.

disable_entities.name: Disable Entities
disable_entities.description: Disable one or more SignalK entities.

entity_ids.name: Entity IDs
entity_ids.description: Entity ID or list of entity IDs to disable.

dump_runtime_state.name: Dump Runtime State
dump_runtime_state.description: Dump current runtime state to log and fire an event.
